Name: Boy-Thing
Description: To wage war on vampires, Shadow Colonel required a good source of wooden stakes. He cut a piece off of Man-Thing and grew Boy-Thing for that very purpose. After the Shadow Colonel's team was defeated by the Avengers, Boy-Thing defected and bonded with Blade, serving the same purpose for him as he did for Shadow Colonel.
